summary: No ship: r6’s implementation is present at HEAD but absent from the authoritative RED baseline. No separate new critical issue found. Simpler alternative: none; correctly pin the existing hermetic witness. Open question: none.

findings.title: Blocker: the r6 witness is outside the locked RED baseline
findings.body: The plan claims a committed RED record proves the call-site contract, but `bugfix-lock.json` still pins `4fd7c557…`. That commit predates `489ef77`, which added the mixed-lane hermetic witness, single-assignment guard, and remaining `propose-pr` paths. The matching record consequently reports 14 regression and 70 characterization tests, not the asserted 15/79. Thus the machine-owned RED does not prove that planner-action overwrites remain red, allowing an approval-lane bypass to appear covered when it is not.
findings.recommendation: Re-pin `red.sha` to a commit containing the r6 witnesses, regenerate the script-owned verify-record for that exact tree, confirm the record includes the 15th hermetic regression, and record the accepted r6 decision in the plan log.

next_steps: Repair the RED pin and verify-record before implementation begins.
Do not re-run GREEN; regenerate only through the machine-owned RED verification workflow.
